Thanksgiving Email Promotion #2			                            Copyright Free Template



Subject:  Get a jumpstart on Black Friday



Dear [first name], 



Black Friday is the world’s busiest shopping day.  



So I want to give you a special deal for Thanksgiving so 

you don’t have to get up at 3am to line up Friday morning:



[insert deal]



Why am I doing this?  Because I am thankful that you’re 

one of my customers and I want you to beat the rush come

Friday. 



[insert details of offer, including website or times they 

can come in to take advantage of the deal]  



But you better take action, because this deal comes

down on [insert deadline].



Sincerely, 



[insert name]



P.S. T’is the season to give thanks. And when you go 

to [insert call to action] you’ll be thanking me for such 

a great deal. 



And you won’t have to battle the crowds, fight for parking

and get stressed out this Thanksgiving. 



But once [insert deadline passes] you’ll forever miss out. 

And you’ll have to wait until next Thanksgiving to take 

advantage.
